description: Start of 1st half without specifying kick-off team.
End of first half.
End of the second half (full time or extra time).
Kick-off of 1st half; home team takes the opening kick-off.
python_detection: detail.startswith("Start 1st half, kickoff:") and home_team in detail
examples: Start 1st half, kickoff:   Al Ahli SC (Doha)
Start 1st half, kickoff:   Al Arabi SC (Qatar)
Start 1st half, kickoff:   Al Duhail SC
Start 1st half, kickoff:   Al Gharafa SC
Start 1st half, kickoff:   Al Khor SC

description: Kick-off of 1st half; away team takes the opening kick-off.
python_detection: detail.startswith("Start 1st half, kickoff:") and away_team in detail
examples: Start 1st half, kickoff:   Al Ahli SC (Doha)
Start 1st half, kickoff:   Al Arabi SC (Qatar)
Start 1st half, kickoff:   Al Duhail SC
Start 1st half, kickoff:   Al Gharafa SC
Start 1st half, kickoff:   Al Khor SC

description: Kick-off of 2nd half; home team takes the kick-off.

examples: Start 2nd half, kickoff:   Al Ahli SC (Doha)
Start 2nd half, kickoff:   Al Arabi SC (Qatar)
Start 2nd half, kickoff:   Al Duhail SC
Start 2nd half, kickoff:   Al Gharafa SC
Start 2nd half, kickoff:   Al Khor SC

description: Kick-off of 2nd half; away team takes the kick-off.
python_detection: detail.startswith("Start 2nd half, kickoff:") and away_team in detail
examples: Start 2nd half, kickoff:   Al Ahli SC (Doha)
Start 2nd half, kickoff:   Al Arabi SC (Qatar)
Start 2nd half, kickoff:   Al Duhail SC
Start 2nd half, kickoff:   Al Gharafa SC

description: Unspecified danger signal.
Match temporarily suspended due to player injury.
Teams walking out onto the pitch.
Players lined up before kick-off.
Pre-match handshake ceremony.
Coin toss event.
Pre-match or in-match minute of silence.
Post-match prize/award ceremony.
Operator photo capture (internal tracking).
Imminent kick-off warning signal.
General missed penalty/shot event.
Possible red card situation being assessed.
General possible penalty situation (no team specified).
No red card issued after review.
No penalty awarded after review.
Ball back in play after a stoppage.
Match temporarily suspended (no specific reason).
Scored goal under investigation / pending review.
Score update in progress.
Score officially updated.
Possible free kick (no team specified).
Possible free kick reviewed and not awarded.
Referee drop ball restart.
Match statistics confirmed by operator.
Betting/trading market closed for this match.
Betting/trading market opened for this match.
Possible disciplinary card being assessed.
No card issued after review.
Possible throw-in (no team specified).
Possible throw-in not awarded.
Change in match conditions (e.g. weather, pitch).
Stoppage time announced by referee.
Details of a previously recorded event updated.
examples: Event details for Goal in the 1. minute changed
Event details for Goal in the 10. minute changed
Event details for Goal in the 100. minute changed
Event details for Goal in the 104. minute changed
Event details for Goal in the 11. minute changed

description: Yellow card timestamp corrected.
python_detection: re.search(r"Yellow card time was adjusted", detail)

description: Match clock adjusted; offset duration may be included.
Score at end of the last period confirmed.
Substitution player details corrected or confirmed.
examples: Substitution details for Substitution in the 100. minute changed - Umm Salal SC  - Player in: 18 - Abdullah Khaled Sheikh, Player out: 8 - Adel Al Sulimane [Player confirmed]
Substitution details for Substitution in the 16. minute changed - Al Wakrah SC  - Player in: 34 - Nabil Erfan, Player out: 28 - Yousef El Khatib [Player confirmed]
Substitution details for Substitution in the 25. minute changed - Al Gharafa SC  - Player in: 2 - Abdalla Yousif, Player out: 11 - Amro Surag [Player confirmed]
Substitution details for Substitution in the 32. minute changed - Al Shamal SC  - Player in: 47 - Fahad Waad, Player out: 67 - Jassim Ali Al Hashemi [Player confirmed]
Substitution details for Substitution in the 33. minute changed - Qatar SC  - Player in: 27 - Youssef Mohamed Ali, Player out: 5 - R. Danzabe [Player confirmed]

description: Player identity for a prior event confirmed.
examples: Player data for Goal in the 1. minute confirmed.
Player data for Goal in the 10. minute confirmed.
Player data for Goal in the 100. minute confirmed.
Player data for Goal in the 101. minute confirmed.
Player data for Goal in the 104. minute confirmed.

description: Match scout/operator has gone offline.
Team lineup updated.
Team jersey colour information updated.
VAR review process started.
No VAR intervention applied.
VAR event confirmed; includes type (Penalty, Unknown).
VAR review concluded.
Penalty kick is imminent.
Situation flagged for possible VAR review.
Specific possible VAR event type identified.
Reason for VAR review specified.
Goal provisionally confirmed pending full review.
Home team attack/possession.
Corner kick for home team; includes side (left/right).
examples: CR   Al Ahli SC (Doha) (Corner - left side)
CR   Al Ahli SC (Doha) (Corner - right side)
CR   Al Arabi SC (Qatar) (Corner - left side)
CR   Al Arabi SC (Qatar) (Corner - right side)
CR   Al Duhail SC (Corner - left side)

description: Dangerous attack for home team.
Dangerous free kick for home team.
Free kick for home team; includes zone and pitch location.
examples: FK   Al Ahli SC (Doha) (Zone 2 - FK facing goal), Zone B2 - Attacking half
FK   Al Ahli SC (Doha) (Zone 2 - FK facing goal), Zone B3 - Attacking half
FK   Al Ahli SC (Doha) (Zone 3 - sides of penalty box), Zone A1 - Attacking half
FK   Al Ahli SC (Doha) (Zone 3 - sides of penalty box), Zone A4 - Attacking half
FK   Al Ahli SC (Doha) (Zone 3 - sides of penalty box), Zone B1 - Attacking half

description: Confirmed goal for home team with scorer, method and zone.
python_detection: re.search(r"\[\d+\s*:\s*\d+\]\s+Goal\s+", detail) and home_team in detail
examples: [1 : 0]   Goal   Al Ahli SC (Doha) [confirmed] - 10 - N. Sliti [Player confirmed] (shot), Zone A2 - Attacking half, Bottom center
[1 : 0]   Goal   Al Ahli SC (Doha) [confirmed] - 17 - S. Yansané [Player confirmed] (shot), Zone A3 - Attacking half, Bottom right
[1 : 0]   Goal   Al Ahli SC (Doha) [confirmed] - 7 - J. Draxler [Player confirmed] (shot), Zone A3 - Attacking half, Unknown
[1 : 0]   Goal   Al Ahli SC (Doha) [confirmed] - 7 - J. Draxler [Player confirmed] (shot), Zone B2 - Attacking half, Bottom right
[1 : 0]   Goal   Al Ahli SC (Doha) [confirmed] - 9 - S. Yansané [Player confirmed] (penalty), Penalty spot, Bottom right

description: Previously recorded goal for home team cancelled.
python_detection: re.search(r"\[\d+\s*:\s*\d+\]\s+Cancel Goal", detail) and home_team in detail

description: Penalty awarded to the home team; includes taker details.
